English: Enter the door to pass the level .
First obtain the key to unlock, then enter the door.
Chinese (Simplified): 首先获得解锁的钥匙，然后进入门内。

English:
Push the box , 
then step on the box to jump onto the platform .

English: Quickly and continuously tap (click) the door several times .
Chinese (Simplified): 快速连续点击（单击）门几次。

Chinese (Simplified): 这次，你偷学了梯云纵，可以二段跳啦

Drag any of top-left button or "Jump" to create stepping stones.

Chinese (Simplified): 用手指按住一边喷泉，让另一边水压更大

English: Tap the traffic light multiple times to destroy it !

After obtaining the yellow key, go directly to open the door instead of opening the 
treasure chest .

rich person .

then move right, jump down, and head left .
